title: Kimi Antonelli breaks F1 history as teenager overtakes George Russell in title race after Japanese GP
tags: The turning point arrived on lap 22 when Oliver Bearman's Haas slammed into the barriers at Spoon curve.;British F1 star limps away from horror crash after hitting into barrier at Japanese GP;EFL stadium to host blockbuster boxing clash as 'David vs Goliath' fight announced;Ben Stokes set to miss weeks of season as England captain recovers from face injury;The GB News Editorial Charter
